configurations.name: local3010
runtimeArgs: import http.server, os; os.chdir('D:/契約'); http.server.test(HandlerClass=http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler, port=3010, bind='127.0.0.1')

configurations.name: frontend
runtimeArgs: import http.server, os; os.chdir('D:/契約'); port=int(os.environ.get('PORT',3000)); http.server.test(HandlerClass=http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler, port=port, bind='127.0.0.1')
